bindings.requirement: Prompt seam is extracted into a leaf module and remains validation-backed

verification.description: Runs the extension validation chain, including the prompt-seam syntax and contract checks that confirm agent-prompts extraction and root wiring parity.

bindings.requirement: Verification registry storage seam is extracted into a leaf module and remains validation-backed

verification.description: Runs the extension validation chain, including registry round-trip and source-shape checks that confirm verification-registry extraction and parity.

bindings.requirement: Bash-policy seam is extracted into a dedicated module with behavior parity validation

verification.description: Runs the extension validation chain, including bash-policy behavioral parity checks, source-shape extraction checks, and forward-compatible validator-chain checks.

bindings.requirement: No separate subagent widget/banner surface remains.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms updateUI only clears the harness widget, live-widget-only helpers are absent, and no separate live subagent banner surface remains.

bindings.requirement: Collapsed subagent tool rows remain per-subagent and activity-rich.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms explore, execute, and generic collapsed renderers still emit one row per subagent beneath the batch summary and preserve activity-rich rendering.

bindings.requirement: Parent explore evidence gate is enforced pre-completion.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms turn_end plus steer wiring, parent evidence thresholds, and removal of the old followUp-based agent_end retry as the primary explore gate.

bindings.requirement: Child explore subagents get child-safe gating and prompt handling, including the generic harness_subagents explore path.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms child explore mode consumption, child-safe prompt injection, no recursive harness_subagents guidance, ready-to-conclude steering, and explore-mode propagation through generic harness_subagents.

bindings.requirement: Validation deterministically covers the new explore gate and generic child-mode propagation.

verification.description: Validation chain syntax-checks the new explore-gate module and executes deterministic source/behavior checks for parent and child gating plus generic explore child-mode propagation.

bindings.requirement: Managed worktree identity is explicit, deterministic, and stored in repo-shared git-common-dir metadata.

verification.description: Validation chain syntax-checks the managed-worktrees seam and runs temp-repo assertions for deterministic managed IDs, branch prefixes, worktree roots, and git-common-dir lease paths.

bindings.requirement: A non-user-facing managed-worktree creation entrypoint exists for orchestration/tests and switches into the managed workspace without exposing a public slash-command workflow.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms the internal managed-worktree bootstrap command/tool wiring, keeps the workflow non-public in docs, and exercises temp-repo bootstrap behavior.

bindings.requirement: Dirty-state preflight prevents silent carryover of local edits into a new managed worktree.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms dirty-repo preflight messaging and the explicit HEAD-only confirmation path for managed-worktree bootstrap.

bindings.requirement: Managed bootstrap creates a persisted target-cwd session file before switching and resolves relative sessionDir against the target worktree.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms target session-file creation, target-cwd header persistence, absolute switch paths, and relative sessionDir resolution under the target worktree root.

bindings.requirement: Session-to-worktree association survives restart and resume, and missing worktree paths fail explicitly while status surfaces the managed identity.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms binding round-trip through the session file, lease activation/release/missing transitions, and managed status surfacing in harness UI/status paths.

bindings.requirement: Managed worktrees use an explicit deterministic lifecycle state model with shared lease records stored under the git common dir.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms the managed lifecycle state model, shared lease persistence under git-common-dir storage, and deterministic activation/release/missing transitions.

bindings.requirement: An authoritative mutation gate blocks harness-controlled mutation outside a valid managed-worktree binding, including execute child subagents and harness_commit.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms parent and child managed mutation gating, child env propagation, cwd/branch/lease checks, and harness_commit coverage under the same binding discipline.

bindings.requirement: Inline janitor safely prunes only disposable managed worktrees and never removes non-managed worktrees.

verification.description: Validation chain confirms janitor startup/bootstrap wiring, temp-repo worktree discovery, clean-expired-non-diverged removal rules, and protection for dirty/diverged or user-created worktrees.

bindings.requirement: Validation deterministically covers the managed-worktree core, including lifecycle, bootstrap, mutation gate, janitor safety, and unchanged built-in /new behavior.

verification.description: Validation chain syntax-checks the new managed-worktrees seam and runs deterministic validators covering bootstrap, lifecycle, mutation gate, janitor safety, and public-surface constraints for Iteration 9.

bindings.requirement: VER can register a passing AC in execute mode and persist it to the verification registry for later regression checks

verification.command: invoke harness_verify_register and harness_verify_list in execute mode
verification.description: Regression re-check of verification-registry plumbing after extension refactors: confirm the verify-register and verify-list tool definitions still exist in extensions/index.ts and remain documented in README.md and INTEGRATION.md. Full live execute-mode tool invocation remains a manual harness check.

bindings.requirement: Committed registry becomes a reusable spec catalog
Legacy v1 data migrates without importing old pass/fail truth
Runtime receipts are repo-shared and append-only
Runtime corruption fails explicitly
Registering a spec must not claim a pass
Executed evidence gets an authoritative tool surface
Listing/status becomes receipt-driven and freshness-aware
Deterministic validation covers migration, sharing, and corruption behavior

verification.description: Aggregate validation and source-backed checks for iteration 10 verification accumulation: v2 committed specs, legacy migration, repo-shared append-only receipts, explicit runtime corruption failure, register/run/list tool wiring, and receipt-derived status behavior.
